description: Initial Luna precursor deployment: power, comms, deployment robotics, ISRU (TEU/PVE/Gas Separator), and volatiles storage buildout for first settlement establishment. Unmanned — AI Manager and base infrastructure only, no crew support items.

required_hardware._note: Excavates raw regolith from pad and tank farm sites. Feeds excavated material into TEU/PVE processing pipeline. Deployed early in Phase 1 to enable closed-loop regolith recycling.

Processes depleted regolith from TEU/PVE pipeline using microwave sintering. Produces compacted foundation material for landing pads and tank farm infrastructure. Enables foundation_sintered gate for subsequent deployments.
v1 had count 1; deploy_volatiles_storage deploys an additional 1, raising total demand to 2.

required_hardware.role: Cryogenic Gas Storage (H2/O2/He3 separation outputs, raw gas buffering)
required_hardware._note: v1 had count 3. deploy_gas_separator's 3 connect_units calls (h2/o2/he3) imply 3 dedicated tanks; deploy_volatiles_storage separately deploys 2 more. Combined demand is 5, not 3 — count corrected per 2026-06-20 review.
NOT present in v1 manifest at all. deploy_volatiles_storage requires it; added fresh for v2.

required_hardware.role: Cryogenic Gas Separation (H2/O2/He3 from TEU+PVE output)
required_hardware._note: NOT present in v1 manifest. task_deploy_gas_separator.json is dated 2026-05-02, after this manifest's likely authoring (other tasks dated 2026-04-09) — added fresh for v2, not a v1 carryover.

Present in v1 (count 2) and in the generic npc_base_deploy_manifest_v3 template. No tasks_v2 file currently has a deploy_unit effect for CAR-300 — no task_affinity exists yet. This is a real gap in tasks_v2 coverage, not an omission in this manifest. Flag for a new task file (e.g. deploy_car_300_robots) before this can be properly affinity-linked.

required_hardware.role: Robot Recharge Station (supports CAR-300 deployment robots)
required_hardware._note: Present in the generic npc_base_deploy_manifest_v3 template, NOT in v1's lunar precursor manifest. Added 2026-06-20 per Tracy's confirmation that 2 CAR-300 robots need a charging point. No tasks_v2 file currently deploys this — same gap as car_300_deployment_robot_mk1 above. Also relevant: 2026-06-19 finding that HeavyLander's charging_ports/dock_robot_for_charge should NOT be generalized — this confirms a dedicated charging-station unit is the correct pattern, consistent with that design decision.
